{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35029", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact

The `/config/update endpoint` does not enforce admin role authorization. A user who is already authenticated into the platform can then use this endpoint to do the following:

  - Modify proxy configuration and environment variables
  - Register custom pass-through endpoint handlers pointing to attacker-controlled Python code, achieving remote code execution
  - Read arbitrary server files by setting UI_LOGO_PATH and fetching via /get_image
  - Take over other priveleged accounts by overwriting UI_USERNAME and UI_PASSWORD environment variables

### Patches

Fixed in v1.83.0. The endpoint now requires `proxy_admin` role.

### Workarounds

Restrict API key distribution. There is no configuration-level workaround.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.26409, "percentile": 0.97751}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T21:59:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35029"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-06T17:17:12Z", "published_at": "2026-04-03T21:59:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/security/advisories/GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35029", "http://seclists.org/fulldisclosure/2026/Apr/17", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/BerriAI/litellm/security-advisories/GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM: Privilege escalation via unrestricted proxy configuration endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T18:40:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-53mr-6c8q-9789", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.83.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.83.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: LiteLLM: Privilege escalation via unrestricted proxy configuration endpoint
